title: Blåhaj Totem
description: Changes the Texture of the Totem of Undying to a Blåhaj Model.
body:
# Blåhaj Totem of Undying by Shadow Dara
Transform your Minecraft experience with the Blåhaj Totem of Undying resource pack! This Resoursepack replaces the traditional Totem of Undying with a cute and cuddly Blåhaj Model, the beloved shark plushie. The Blåhaj Totem of Undying will keep you safe in style. When ever you are exploring dangerous caves or fighting mobs, your trusty Blåhaj will be there to save the day.

## Important
**If you try to add the _Resourcepack_ in a newer/older version, you may see a message like this:**
```
This Resourcepack was made for a newer/older Version of Minecraft
```
**Just ignore that message, it will still work!!!**
